title: Deputy Manager (Software Development)
description: Core backend developer on Poshan Tracker, the Government of India's nationwide nutrition-governance platform (Ministry of Women & Child Development) serving millions of beneficiaries. I own the mobile app's backend APIs and lead its microservices, database, and health-system integration work.
achievements: Own and build the backend APIs powering the Poshan Tracker mobile app, a nationwide MWCD platform serving millions of beneficiaries
Led the monolith-to-microservices migration, decomposing the platform into 10+ independently deployable services for faster, safer releases
Migrated core data stores to DynamoDB, sustaining millions of records with low-latency reads and writes at scale
Architected and shipped the ABDM (Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission) integration module, linking the platform to national digital health infrastructure
Restructured high-traffic modules to achieve sub-200ms API response times and ~40% lower server load
Sustained 99.9% uptime across mission-critical nutrition-tracking workflows
Delivered features end-to-end across PHP/Laravel, Node.js (Fastify), Redis, MariaDB, RabbitMQ, DynamoDB, Docker, and AWS

title: Software Engineer Trainee
description: Completed an intensive enterprise-Java engineering program, building a strong foundation in the Spring ecosystem, Hibernate ORM, and RabbitMQ-based asynchronous messaging.
achievements: Completed a 4-month intensive program in core Java and the Spring framework, building backend services with clean, object-oriented code
Implemented Hibernate ORM persistence layers, mapping relational schemas to application entities
Built RabbitMQ-backed messaging for asynchronous, decoupled communication between services
Applied enterprise design patterns through hands-on project work and a capstone backend build

title: Web Developer Intern
description: Kick-started my web career during a 3-month internship building custom, responsive WordPress sites and writing SEO-driven content.
achievements: Built and launched custom, responsive WordPress sites using themes, plugins, and page builders to meet client briefs
Published SEO-optimized blog content to improve on-page discoverability and organic search ranking
Customized themes with HTML and CSS to extend layouts beyond default builder capabilities
Partnered with the team to turn designs into polished, client-ready pages on deadline
